mapper.insert: insert into team_invitation_record (team_id, inviter_id, invitee_id, status, create_time) values (#{teamId}, #{inviterId}, #{inviteeId}, '0', sysdate())
mapper.select: select r.*, t.team_name, c.competition_name from team_invitation_record r left join comp_team t on r.team_id = t.team_id left join competition c on t.competition_id = c.competition_id where r.id = #{id}

select r.*, t.team_name, u.user_name as inviter_name, c.competition_name from team_invitation_record r left join comp_team t on r.team_id = t.team_id left join competition c on t.competition_id = c.competition_id left join sys_user u on r.inviter_id = u.user_id where r.invitee_id = #{inviteeId} order by r.create_time desc

select r.*, t.team_name, us.user_name as invitee_name, c.competition_name from team_invitation_record r left join comp_team t on r.team_id = t.team_id left join competition c on t.competition_id = c.competition_id left join sys_user us on r.invitee_id = us.user_id where r.inviter_id = #{inviterId} order by r.create_time desc

select r.*, t.team_name, u.user_name as inviter_name, us.user_name as invitee_name, c.competition_name from team_invitation_record r left join comp_team t on r.team_id = t.team_id left join competition c on t.competition_id = c.competition_id left join sys_user u on r.inviter_id = u.user_id left join sys_user us on r.invitee_id = us.user_id where r.team_id = #{teamId} order by r.create_time desc
